mission.title: istio: Istio give `x-forwarded-proto=http` to upstream server when using SSL termination
mission.description: Istio give `x-forwarded-proto=http` to upstream server when using SSL termination. Requested by 13+ users.

steps.title: Check current istio deployment
steps.description:
Verify your istio version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
helm list -n istio-system 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working istio installation.

steps.title: Review istio configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant istio configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl get configmap -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio
```
Istio give `x-forwarded-proto=http` to upstream server when using SSL termination.

Istio give `x-forwarded-proto=https`

1. Deploy a nginx with SSL termination on a domain, change `<your domain name>`, [config file][1]
1.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Istio give `x-forwarded-proto=http` to upstream server when…
steps.description:
I think this can done with some combination of https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/pull/7995 and https://github.com/istio/istio/wiki/EnvoyFilter-Samples#use-remote-address-and-xff-num-trust-hops if someone has a chance to try it out
```yaml
...
   Request Headers:
	x-forwarded-port=80
	x-forwarded-proto=http
   ...
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl get events -n istio-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Istio give `x-forwarded-proto=http` to upstream server when…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: I think this can done with some combination of https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/pull/7995 and https://github.com/istio/istio/wiki/EnvoyFilter-Samples#use-remote-address-and-xff-num-trust-hops if someone has a chance to try it out

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with istio installed or the issue environment reproducible.
